content: When extending workflow handlers in Teamcenter ITK, validate dataset ownership and access rights before invoking AE_save_dataset to avoid transient deadlocks under high parallel job volume.
Property constant updates in BMIDE require regeneration and template deployment to all pools; skip-level migration can leave stale LOV references unless model cache is explicitly refreshed.
For Active Workspace command panel customization, align declarative view model conditions with object type hierarchy to prevent invisible actions caused by mismatched condition context.

Slow query spikes in Teamcenter often correlate with missing statistics on POM_APPLICATION_OBJECT and stale execution plans after bulk import; trigger incremental stats and capture AWR snapshot deltas.
Blue-green deployment for Teamcenter web tier should pin session affinity during cutover and verify tcserver health endpoints before switching ingress to avoid partial login loops.
For recurring FMS ticket upload failures, compare FSC/FCC version matrix and inspect cache write permissions; mixed patch levels frequently manifest as intermittent transfer timeout errors.
MCP servers should expose read-first tools for repository, log, and SQL diagnostics, with write-capable tools gated by explicit human approval and auditable command traces.
Never execute destructive remediation directly from AI suggestions; produce a change plan, validate against non-production evidence, and obtain CAB approval before production execution.
